text.message: Do u guys feel this game is very streaky? Like sometime u get good picks all the time and other times just out of luck
In a 100 games u will have a bad streakmand a good streak
Ya makes sense, maybe it evens it over a bigger sample size
At least I wud have in his position
8,10 too god with their ows setup
Not taking 8,10 kinda give blue the advantageous ows
Yeah, also blue already has port somit doesnt hurt him as much
This myb goodmfor us, red gave himself army comp
For u maybe, my brick is not rolling lol
I hoped u gave me the trade instead of blue
I was afraid u plow me on 4 11
Oh i would trade u that plow
I settled so I don’t think I can plow rn
Man I am collateral damage, I get blocked from both because I share with them
Ok now its blue vs easy bots game lol
Naah bro u get ur city too fast
Blue n red could u open the trade channels?
what happened lol are you scared o f green all of a sudden now
No game is better when there are trades all around
afraid the game is already won by green thanks to you feeeding him ore
Green’S is the city, urs is the army
Retry sure my boy here has mono lol
Man wood n brick useless for me no expansion spots left
I think blue is saving for his city too
Ore or two wood \ sheep nb?
Not sure how red keeps avoidi g robs here
bro sits on 5 pts with two non knight devs and a road
and gaslights us into believing he's not a threat lol
Ya road is on lock for him
I will probably end thengame with 8 points
But need to stop the red settle on 6
If i had a mono i would play it last orbit
then rb or yop or whatever
otherwise how are you gonna end on 8 and not on 9
Sorry green can’t trade u here, ur non knight devs are scary
Lack of 7s helped him stack up man
In deed flip a knight for 10
